targets.queryText: SELECT UPPER(COALESCE(status,'n/a')) AS value FROM runs ORDER BY started_at_utc DESC LIMIT 1
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT UPPER(COALESCE(status,'n/a')) AS value FROM runs ORDER BY started_at_utc DESC LIMIT 1

targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM runs WHERE status='succeeded' AND substr(started_at_utc,1,10) >= date('now','-7 day')
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM runs WHERE status='succeeded' AND substr(started_at_utc,1,10) >= date('now','-7 day')

targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM runs WHERE status='failed' AND substr(started_at_utc,1,10) >= date('now','-30 day')
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM runs WHERE status='failed' AND substr(started_at_utc,1,10) >= date('now','-30 day')

targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM facts_source_daily
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM facts_source_daily

targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM lm_raw
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM lm_raw

targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM investment_transactions
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM investment_transactions

targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM account_balances
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM account_balances

targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM dividend_events_provider
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM dividend_events_provider

targets.queryText: SELECT (day || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, runs_total AS Runs, runs_failed AS Failed FROM (SELECT substr(started_at_utc,1,10) AS day, COUNT(*) AS runs_total, SUM(CASE WHEN status='failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS runs_failed FROM runs WHERE substr(started_at_utc,1,10) >= date('now','-120 day') GROUP BY substr(started_at_utc,1,10)) ORDER BY day
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (day || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, runs_total AS Runs, runs_failed AS Failed FROM (SELECT substr(started_at_utc,1,10) AS day, COUNT(*) AS runs_total, SUM(CASE WHEN status='failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS runs_failed FROM runs WHERE substr(started_at_utc,1,10) >= date('now','-120 day') GROUP BY substr(started_at_utc,1,10)) ORDER BY day

targets.queryText: WITH facts AS (SELECT as_of_date_local AS day, COUNT(*) AS facts_rows, 0 AS raw_rows FROM facts_source_daily WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-120 day') GROUP BY as_of_date_local), raw AS (SELECT substr(pulled_at_utc,1,10) AS day, 0 AS facts_rows, COUNT(*) AS raw_rows FROM lm_raw WHERE substr(pulled_at_utc,1,10) >= date('now','-120 day') GROUP BY substr(pulled_at_utc,1,10)), combined AS (SELECT * FROM facts UNION ALL SELECT * FROM raw) SELECT (day || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, SUM(facts_rows) AS Facts, SUM(raw_rows) AS Raw FROM combined GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
targets.rawQueryText: WITH facts AS (SELECT as_of_date_local AS day, COUNT(*) AS facts_rows, 0 AS raw_rows FROM facts_source_daily WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-120 day') GROUP BY as_of_date_local), raw AS (SELECT substr(pulled_at_utc,1,10) AS day, 0 AS facts_rows, COUNT(*) AS raw_rows FROM lm_raw WHERE substr(pulled_at_utc,1,10) >= date('now','-120 day') GROUP BY substr(pulled_at_utc,1,10)), combined AS (SELECT * FROM facts UNION ALL SELECT * FROM raw) SELECT (day || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, SUM(facts_rows) AS Facts, SUM(raw_rows) AS Raw FROM combined GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Facts and Raw Ingest per Day

targets.queryText: SELECT substr(started_at_utc,1,16) AS Started, COALESCE(substr(finished_at_utc,1,16),'') AS Finished, UPPER(status) AS Status, CASE WHEN finished_at_utc IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE round((julianday(replace(substr(finished_at_utc,1,19),'T',' ')) - julianday(replace(substr(started_at_utc,1,19),'T',' '))) * 24 * 60, 1) END AS Min, substr(COALESCE(error_message,''),1,36) AS Error FROM runs ORDER BY started_at_utc DESC LIMIT 6
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT substr(started_at_utc,1,16) AS Started, COALESCE(substr(finished_at_utc,1,16),'') AS Finished, UPPER(status) AS Status, CASE WHEN finished_at_utc IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE round((julianday(replace(substr(finished_at_utc,1,19),'T',' ')) - julianday(replace(substr(started_at_utc,1,19),'T',' '))) * 24 * 60, 1) END AS Min, substr(COALESCE(error_message,''),1,36) AS Error FROM runs ORDER BY started_at_utc DESC LIMIT 6

targets.queryText: SELECT * FROM (SELECT 'runs' AS TableName, COUNT(*) AS Rows, MAX(substr(started_at_utc,1,16)) AS Latest, 'status log' AS Notes FROM runs UNION ALL SELECT 'facts_source_daily', COUNT(*), MAX(as_of_date_local), 'facts rows' FROM facts_source_daily UNION ALL SELECT 'lm_raw', COUNT(*), MAX(substr(pulled_at_utc,1,16)), 'raw pulls' FROM lm_raw UNION ALL SELECT 'investment_transactions', COUNT(*), MAX(date), 'broker txns' FROM investment_transactions UNION ALL SELECT 'account_balances', COUNT(*), MAX(as_of_date_local), 'balance pulls' FROM account_balances UNION ALL SELECT 'dividend_events_provider', COUNT(*), MAX(ex_date), 'provider divs' FROM dividend_events_provider UNION ALL SELECT 'dividend_events_lm', COUNT(*), MAX(ex_date), 'lm divs' FROM dividend_events_lm UNION ALL SELECT 'split_events', COUNT(*), MAX(ex_date), 'splits' FROM split_events UNION ALL SELECT 'cusip_map', COUNT(*), 'n/a', 'mapping rows' FROM cusip_map UNION ALL SELECT 'locks', COUNT(*), MAX(substr(expires_at_utc,1,16)), 'active locks' FROM locks UNION ALL SELECT 'metadata', COUNT(*), 'n/a', 'key/value' FROM metadata UNION ALL SELECT 'margin_balance_history', COUNT(*), MAX(as_of_date_local), 'margin hist' FROM margin_balance_history) ORDER BY Rows DESC, TableName
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT * FROM (SELECT 'runs' AS TableName, COUNT(*) AS Rows, MAX(substr(started_at_utc,1,16)) AS Latest, 'status log' AS Notes FROM runs UNION ALL SELECT 'facts_source_daily', COUNT(*), MAX(as_of_date_local), 'facts rows' FROM facts_source_daily UNION ALL SELECT 'lm_raw', COUNT(*), MAX(substr(pulled_at_utc,1,16)), 'raw pulls' FROM lm_raw UNION ALL SELECT 'investment_transactions', COUNT(*), MAX(date), 'broker txns' FROM investment_transactions UNION ALL SELECT 'account_balances', COUNT(*), MAX(as_of_date_local), 'balance pulls' FROM account_balances UNION ALL SELECT 'dividend_events_provider', COUNT(*), MAX(ex_date), 'provider divs' FROM dividend_events_provider UNION ALL SELECT 'dividend_events_lm', COUNT(*), MAX(ex_date), 'lm divs' FROM dividend_events_lm UNION ALL SELECT 'split_events', COUNT(*), MAX(ex_date), 'splits' FROM split_events UNION ALL SELECT 'cusip_map', COUNT(*), 'n/a', 'mapping rows' FROM cusip_map UNION ALL SELECT 'locks', COUNT(*), MAX(substr(expires_at_utc,1,16)), 'active locks' FROM locks UNION ALL SELECT 'metadata', COUNT(*), 'n/a', 'key/value' FROM metadata UNION ALL SELECT 'margin_balance_history', COUNT(*), MAX(as_of_date_local), 'margin hist' FROM margin_balance_history) ORDER BY Rows DESC, TableName
